definition_en: A substance added to soil to help plants grow
example: She spread fertiliser on the garden before spring.

definition_en: Decayed organic material used to improve soil
example: We use compost made from kitchen scraps.

definition_en: To cut branches from a tree or plant to improve growth
example: Prune the rose bushes in early spring.

definition_en: A wild plant that grows where it is not wanted
example: The garden was full of weeds after the rain.

definition_en: The process of supplying water to land for growing plants
example: The farm uses a drip irrigation system.

definition_en: A row of bushes or shrubs forming a boundary
example: He trimmed the hedge along the driveway.

definition_en: A glass building where plants are grown in a controlled temperature
example: She grows tomatoes in her greenhouse.

definition_en: Material spread on soil to retain moisture and suppress weeds
example: Spread mulch around the base of plants to keep them moist.

definition_en: A plant that lives for more than two years, returning each season
example: Lavender is a popular perennial in English gardens.

definition_en: A plant that lives for one growing season
example: Sunflowers are annuals that must be replanted each year.

definition_en: The top layer of ground in which plants grow
example: This soil is rich in nutrients.

definition_en: A young plant grown from seed
example: She started the seedlings indoors before planting them outside.

definition_en: An area of short, regularly mowed grass
example: He mows the lawn every Saturday morning.

definition_en: A paved outdoor area next to a house
example: We had breakfast on the patio.

definition_en: A garden tool with a long handle and metal teeth used to gather leaves
example: He raked the autumn leaves into a pile.

definition_en: Able to survive with little water
example: Plant drought-resistant varieties in dry climates.

definition_en: A container used to collect and decompose organic waste
example: Put your vegetable peelings in the compost bin.

definition_en: Flowers on a tree, especially fruit trees in spring
example: The cherry blossom is beautiful in April.

definition_en: Covered with plants that have grown too much
example: The garden was completely overgrown after a year of neglect.

definition_en: A small hand tool used for digging in soil
example: She used a trowel to plant the bulbs.
